mapper.update: UPDATE admin_user SET last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_login_ip = #{ipAddress}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
UPDATE admin_user SET failed_login_count = failed_login_count + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
UPDATE admin_user SET failed_login_count = 0, locked_until = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
UPDATE admin_user SET locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
UPDATE admin_user SET locked_until = NULL, failed_login_count = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
